title: DCP Finding
description: A stated finding (issue, observation, risk) about a subject. Descriptive only.

severity.description: Ordered vocabulary (low to high): info, low, medium, high, critical. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.

category.description: Open classification label (e.g. security, performance, correctness, style).

location.description: A DESCRIPTIVE locator only. 'path' MUST NOT be passed to filesystem, shell, or URL APIs without independent sanitization; it is not a file-access grant.

status.description: Record vocabulary: open, acknowledged, resolved, wont_fix, duplicate. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.
